fixture: inline: 'Set up a token foundation with a blue brand color, a neutral gray ramp, a 4px spacing scale, and one semantic alias color.action.primary.bg.'

must_create: token set 'primitives' with at least one color and one spacing token
token set 'semantic' with color.action.primary.bg referencing a primitive
all spacing tokens are multiples of 4
must_not: shapes bound directly to primitive color tokens
any token created without a checkpoint/approval
use of hyphenated token types like 'border-radius'

pass_criteria: tokenOverview() shows primitives + semantic; semantic alias resolves to the primitive value; validateTokens.js reports 0 off-grid and 0 unresolved.
